name: python3-libfsxfs
title: python3-libfsxfs
summary: llibrary to access the SGI X File System -- Python 3 bindings
description:
llibrary to access the SGI X File System -- Python 3 bindings
libfsxfs is a library to access the SGI X File System (XFS).
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libfsxfs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libfsxfs because llibrary to access the SGI X File System -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libfsxfs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libfsxfs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libfsxfs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
